  "findings": [
    "Stored energy source missed during lockout/tagout isolation (hydraulic, gravity, or capacitor energy not dissipated or restrained)."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt any work on the affected equipment.",
    "Identify and isolate all stored energy sources, including bleeding hydraulic pressure, blocking gravity-supported components, and discharging capacitors.",
    "Update the energy control procedure (LOTO procedure) to include all energy sources.",
    "Re-verify zero energy state before work resumes."
  ],
  "rationale": "The lockout/tagout isolation failed to account for stored energy (hydraulic, gravity, or capacitor), which violates the core requirement of OSHA 1910.147 to isolate and dissipate all potentially hazardous energy sources. This presents an immediate, critical safety hazard to personnel.",

    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(4)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(d)(5)"
  ]
